meaning: adj.易驾驭的,驯良的,易管教的,易处理的
examples: Gold and silver are tractable metals.
Other questions are even less tractable.
These problems are onerous, but most are probably tractable.
Clearly, they expect more Western offers will be made to induce them to be more tractable.
The new Congress elected in October, which starts work in February, may be more tractable.
